zh.lifeSummary: 當Helvig av Holstein於大約1257年出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格易時，她的父親Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe26歲，母親Elisabeth von Mecklenburg27歲。她於1276年11月11日與King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden在瑞典烏普薩拉卡爾馬結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年2月14日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helvig av Holstein于大约1257年出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格易时，她的父亲Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe26岁，母亲Elisabeth von Mecklenburg27岁。她于1276年11月11日与King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden在瑞典烏普薩拉卡爾馬结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年2月14日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Helvig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Hedwig ‘battle strife’ , borne by the young girl who is the central character in Henrik Ibsen's play The Wild Duck ( 1886 ).

nameMeanings.name: av
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Holstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from the province of Holstein, long disputed between Germany and Denmark. This gets its name from holsten, the dative plural, originally used after a preposition, of holst, from Middle Low German holt-sate ‘dweller in the woods’ (from Middle Low German holt ‘wood’ + sate, sete ‘tenant’). The final syllable has been erroneously altered by analogy with North German Steen ‘stone’, which in South German and standard German has the form Stein.

variants.name: Hulstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Albertus, Kees.
Dutch vowel variant of German   Holstein  .

variants.name: Hollstein
meanings: Mainly Norwegian: from an Old Norse personal name from hallr ‘rock’ + steinn ‘stone’.

variants.name: Holst
meanings: Altered form, first recorded in the 15th century, of the Old Saxon name Horsa ‘horse’.

variants.name: Holsten
meanings: North German: variant of   Holstein   or   Holst  .

en.lifeSummary: When Helvig av Holstein was born about 1257, in Itzehoe, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, her father, Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe, was 26 and her mother, Elisabeth von Mecklenburg, was 27. She married King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden on 11 November 1276, in Kalmar, Uppsala, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 14 February 1326.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helvig av Holstein est née environ 1257, à Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Mecklenburg, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden le 11 novembre 1276, à Kalmar, Uppsala, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 14 février 1326.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helvig av Holstein um 1257 in Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe 26 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth von Mecklenburg 27. Sie hat am 11. November 1276 in Kalmar, Uppsala, Schweden King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 14. Februar 1326.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helvig av Holstein è nata il circa 1257 nel Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, sua padre, Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth von Mecklenburg, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden il 11 novembre 1276, nel Kalmar, Uppsala, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 14 febbraio 1326.

ja.lifeSummary: Helvig av Holsteinが約1257年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス ステインブルグイツェーhオで生まれた時，父Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoeは26歳，母Elisabeth von Mecklenburgは27歳であった。1276年11月11日にスウェーデンウップサラカルマーでKing Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Swedenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1326年2月14日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helvig av Holstein(이)가 대략 1257년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 스타인버그 잇츠호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth von Mecklenburg(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1276년 11월 11일 스웨덴 업프사라 캘마에서 King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 2월 14일 이전 사망했다.

mn.about 1257–before 14 February 1326: ойролцоогоор 1257 он–1326 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 14–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helvig av Holstein nasceu aproximadamente 1257, em Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Mecklenburg, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden em 11 de novembro de 1276, em Kalmar, Uppsala, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 14 de fevereiro de 1326.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helvig av Holstein родилась около 1257 г. в местности ицэо, крис стинбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, её отцу по имени Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Mecklenburg, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden 11 ноября 1276 г. в местности калмар, уппсала, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 14 февраль 1326 г.

sm.about 1257–before 14 February 1326: e tusa o le 1257–a'e le'I oo le 14 Fepuari 1326

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helvig av Holstein nació aproximadamente 1257, en Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, su papá, Gerhard I von Holstein-Itzehoe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elisabeth von Mecklenburg, tenía 27 años. Se casó con King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden el 11 de noviembre de 1276, en Kalmar, Uppsala, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 14 de febrero de 1326.
